parameters.description: Relay messages to your own IFTTT through the UnitySVC gateway. POST a native ifttt payload; the gateway composes the upstream URL from your stored secrets and forwards it. The free byok channel uses your own stored credentials; the plus channel binds extra per-enrollment destinations via parameters.
parameters.plus_base_url: ${ customer_secrets.IFTTT_BASE ?? https://maker.ifttt.com }/trigger/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.events_secret }} }/with/key/${ customer_secrets.{{ params.webhook_id_secret }} }

events_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's ifttt events

webhook_id_secret.description: Name of the customer secret holding this enrollment's ifttt webhook id
